name: Gasper Vladi
alt_names: ギャスパー・ヴラディ
description:
__Rank/Role:__ Low-class devil (Former human/vampire)/Bishop 
__Sacred Gear:__ Forbidden Balor View 

A half-vampire male cross-dresser who has the ability to stop the time of those he sees but he is unable to control it. He is sealed by Rias as ordered by the elders till she has grown up enough to control him. He still is unable to have a full command on his powers but can improve a lot by drinking Ise's blood.
